description: Read-only. Use to find workflows in a project by name, description, or trigger type before inspection or editing. Trigger filters include database, auth email, repeating, broadcast, and no-trigger workflows. Returns paginated workflow summaries, published/sandbox state, trigger type, workflow URLs,

labels.name: list_brand_styles
labels.description: Read-only. Use when the user wants to inspect saved project brand styles for generated email drafts. Returns paginated project brand style summaries, ids, default status, style metadata, and app URLs. Do not use to create, update, delete, or expose raw style provenance.

labels.name: get_workflow_and_preview_url
labels.description: Read-only. Use before editing, verifying, or preparing publish for an existing workflow. Returns normalized draft and published workflow structure plus the Dreamlit preview/builder URL and status URLs. Do not use to create, update, publish, or unpublish workflows.

labels.name: get_analytics
labels.description: Read-only. Use to query Dreamlit analytics for overview metrics, notification rows, recipient engagement, or workflow run rows with filters, sorting, and cursor pagination. Returns bounded structured analytics data, effective query metadata, pagination details when rows are included, and relevant ap

labels.name: send_workflow_test
labels.description: Side effect when confirmSend is true: sends one current draft email or Slack message for review, but does not publish, schedule, or edit the workflow. Use after authoring or inspection when the user wants to verify an important message before publishing. Returns sent-test details, app URLs, a confir

labels.name: prepare_publish
labels.description: Read-only validation step before publishing. Use after the user asks to publish and after inspecting the workflow if needed. Returns validation status, publish mode, preview URL, and a confirmation payload with version/timestamp safety checks for confirm_publish. Does not publish or schedule anythin

labels.name: confirm_publish
labels.description: Use only after explicit user confirmation and a prior prepare_publish result to publish or schedule a Dreamlit workflow. Side effect: installs live database/repeating/auth triggers, schedules or sends broadcasts, and may enable notification delivery; sandbox mode can hold notifications for inspectio

labels.name: unpublish_workflow
labels.description: Use after explicit user intent to unpublish a Dreamlit workflow. Side effect: disables live triggers or schedules for that workflow and stops future automated sends. Returns updated workflow status and app URLs. Do not use for deleting drafts, canceling one broadcast run, or editing workflow content

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_status, list_projects, list_workflows, list_brand_styles, get_workflow_and_preview_url, get_analytics, prepare_publish · Private data: create_or_update_workflow, list_workflows, get_analytics, confirm_publish · Public sink: get_status, create_or_update_workflow, list_workflows, list_brand_styles, get_workflow_and_preview_url, send_workflow_test, prepare_publish, confirm_publish, unpublish_workflow · Destructive: create_or_update_workflow, list_brand_styles, get_analytics, unpublish_workflow.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_status, list_projects, list_workflows, list_brand_styles, get_workflow_and_preview_url, get_analytics, prepare_publish · Private data: create_or_update_workflow, list_workflows, get_analytics, confirm_publish · Public sink: get_status, create_or_update_workflow, list_workflows, list_brand_styles, get_workflow_and_preview_url, send_workflow_test, prepare_publish, confirm_publish, unpublish_workflow · Destructive: create_or_update_workflow, list_brand_styles, get_analytics, unpublish_workflow

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
